title: Resetting Your Active Directory / SSO Password
text:
Q: How do I reset my Active Directory / SSO password?
A: To reset your Active Directory / SSO password, follow these steps: Step 1: Press 'Ctrl + Alt + Delete' on your keyboard. Step 2: Click on 'Change a password'. Step 3: Enter your current password in the 'Old password' field. Step 4: Type your new password in the 'New password' field, ensuring it meets the company's password policy (at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters). Step 5: Re-enter your new password in the 'Confirm password' field. Step 6: Click 'OK' to confirm the change. Step 7: You will receive a notification that your password has been changed successfully. Step 8: Use your new password to log in to all systems that utilize Active Directory / SSO. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
